title: Per-Account Dashboard — Local (MA1) to Cloud Web (MA3)
summary: Phased dashboard work: MA1 — update local dashboard (port 8080) to show positions, P&L, and trade history broken out per account rather than one aggregated view. MA3 — cloud web dashboard each user opens in any browser, showing live positions and P&L per account with AI rationale. Same data model, different deployment targets.
approach: Update dashboard.py to query positions per account_id from ConnectionManager. Render three side-by-side panels: options account, longs account, scalping account. Each shows: live positions, today P&L, last 5 trades with AI rationale snippet, agent accept/discard log. No new data storage needed — read from existing ib_insync portfolio() calls per account.
